title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and built a responsive personal portfolio using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. Features dynamic project rendering from a JSON data file, live GitHub API stats, dark/light theme switching via localStorage, and a modular navigation system shared across all pages.

title: Power Outage Analysis & Cause Prediction
description: Analyzed 1,500+ major U.S. power outages using climate, regional, and operational data. Performed data cleaning, EDA, and hypothesis testing to quantify how climate regions and outage causes influence outage duration. Built and tuned an XGBoost multiclass classifier, improving accuracy from 0.60 to 0.71 and F1-score from 0.32 to 0.48.

title: Full-Stack Rocket Telemetry Dashboard
description: Developed a full-stack web application for SEDS UCSD that visualizes real-time rocket engine test data using React and MQTT, with a Python backend to process incoming sensor streams and control rocket parameters remotely. Also analyzed 1GB+ of rocket sensor data using BigQuery and Python to generate visualizations for engine tuning.

title: Real-Time IoT Live Graphing System
description: Built a Python-based MQTT publisher/subscriber system that streams three concurrent sensor data channels in real time. An earlier iteration of the rocket telemetry stack, used for prototyping live data visualization pipelines with coordinated hardware-software interfacing.

title: Fitbit Data Analysis — Google Capstone (Bellabeat)
description: Analyzed Fitbit smart device data for Bellabeat, a women's wellness tech company, to uncover trends in activity levels, sleep patterns, and calorie burn. Used SQL and Python for data cleaning and analysis, providing strategic insights to inform marketing and product development decisions.

title: Car Valuation Prediction Model
description: Completed under the guidance of the Associate VP of Technology at Edmunds. Collected and preprocessed car attribute data (year, mileage, engine size, transmission type), encoded categorical variables, handled missing values, and trained a machine learning model in Python to predict car market valuations.

title: Financial Search Engine - UCSD SFIC
description: Led development of an internal financial search engine for UCSD's $1.1M student-run investment fund. Built web scraping pipelines, a FastAPI backend, and MongoDB database to aggregate and structure market data. Designed NLP pipelines to analyze queries and extract research trends, driving a 30% improvement in search efficiency.

title: Macroeconomic Regime Classification Pipeline
description: Built a macroeconomic regime classification system for UCSD's student investment fund by aggregating 40+ years of CPI, yield curve, VIX, credit spreads, unemployment, and industrial production data. Applied feature engineering, scaling, and class-imbalance handling to train SVM and other ML models generating actionable market insights.

title: AI Transcript Validation System - UCSD ITS
description: Collaborating with engineers and admissions staff to build an AI-powered multi-pass OCR system to automate UCSD transcript validation. Integrates NanoNets and Llama for sectioning, OCR, and reasoning, replacing seasonal manual review roles and reducing costs by over $100K annually while accelerating the admissions process.

title: LLM Contract Review AI Agent - UCSD ITS
description: Leveraged large language models to build AI agents for UCSD legal contract review, correlating with a 10% increase in contracts settled per month. Conducted advanced prompt engineering and modified backend code to ensure accurate clause detection, parsing, and structured output extraction from complex legal documents.

title: Goldman Sachs Possibilities Engineering Summit
description: Selected to participate in Goldman Sachs' immersive engineering program, gaining hands-on exposure to financial technology systems including risk management platforms, controllers infrastructure, and the intersection of software engineering and quantitative finance.
